empty.title: No agents yet
empty.description: Build your AI team and start a task.

instructions.emptyDescription: Tell your agent how it should think and act.
instructions.helper: How this agent should think and act.
instructions.savedActiveSession: Saved · Takes effect in your next conversation
instructions.noProjectsHint: Bind a project to see its CLAUDE.md here
instructions.readOnlyBanner: This file belongs to {{name}}. Edit it in your project directory.
instructions.projectClaudeMdMissing: No CLAUDE.md found in this project.

learnings.emptyDescription: The agent jots things down as it works, or you can add them yourself.
learnings.helper: Quick notes the agent picks up over time.
learnings.inputPlaceholder: Type a learning and press Enter…
learnings.confirmRemoveDescription: The agent will lose this note. You can add it back later.

rules.helper: Hard constraints the agent must always follow. Loaded into every session.

projectContext.title: Project context
projectContext.description: Injected into all agents. Describe your project, conventions, and rules.
projectContext.placeholder: Project context, coding conventions, architecture notes...

agentPrompts.title: Agent prompts
agentPrompts.description: Each agent mode gets its own system prompt.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: Reusable procedures the agents can run.

learnings.title: Learnings
learnings.description: Agents save learnings as they work. You can add them manually too.

settings.title: Settings
settings.worktreeModeDescription: Create a separate git worktree for each task
settings.installCommandPlaceholder: e.g. pnpm install, npm install, cargo build
settings.devCommandPlaceholder: e.g. pnpm dev, npm run dev, cargo run

files.emptyDescription: Files created by your assistant will appear here.

roleHints.cto-agent: Architecture docs, decision records, technical specs
roleHints.qa-agent: Test reports, bug logs, coverage summaries
roleHints.fallback: Documents and outputs created by your agent

repo.emptyState: Bind a repository to view git status
repo.selectCommit: Select a commit to view diff
repo.noBindings: No projects bound to this agent
repo.bindingsHelp: Select the projects this agent should work on. Leave all unchecked for CTO mode (sees every workspace project).
repo.exportTeamTitle: Write a team manifest to <repo>/.squad/team.json so collaborators can hire the same team in one click.
repo.exportEmptyBody: Hire some role agents (Maya, Diego, Peter…) first. Custom agents are skipped.
repo.exportSuccessBody_one: Wrote {{count}} role to .squad/team.json. Commit it to share with collaborators.
repo.exportSuccessBody_other: Wrote {{count}} roles to .squad/team.json. Commit it to share with collaborators.

docs.scopeWorkspaceHint: Shared across every agent in this workspace
docs.pickOrCreate: Select a doc or create one from a template

sprints.phaseOwnersHelp: Assign an agent to each sprint phase. When a story reaches that phase it goes to that agent automatically. Leave blank to keep the current owner.

mcp.title: MCP Servers
mcp.description: Model Context Protocol servers available in every session for this agent.
mcp.emptyHint: Add servers to give this agent access to Playwright, databases, APIs, and more via MCP.

weeklyArch.name: Weekly architecture review
weeklyArch.prompt: Review the current architecture across all active repositories. Flag drift, technical debt hot-spots, and cross-team dependencies that need attention this week.

dailyStandup.name: Daily standup notes
dailyStandup.prompt: Summarise yesterday's merged PRs, open blockers, and today's priorities across the team. Output a brief standup note.

monthlyTechDebt.name: Monthly tech debt scan
monthlyTechDebt.prompt: Scan the codebase for TODO/FIXME comments, deprecated dependencies, and files over the 200-line limit. Produce a prioritised list of items to address next sprint.

weeklySystemAudit.name: Weekly design system audit
weeklySystemAudit.prompt: Check for components that deviate from the design system tokens (colours, spacing, typography). List inconsistencies with the file and component name.

dailyInspiration.name: Daily design inspiration scrape
dailyInspiration.prompt: Find three recent UI patterns or design case studies relevant to the current project. Summarise what makes each one effective.

fridayReview.name: Friday design review
fridayReview.prompt: Review all design changes merged this week. Check consistency with the style guide and flag anything that needs a follow-up before next sprint.

dailyApiHealth.name: Daily API health check
dailyApiHealth.prompt: Review recent API error rates, slow queries, and timeout logs. Summarise any anomalies and suggest root causes.

weeklyDeps.name: Weekly dependency audit
weeklyDeps.prompt: Check all backend dependencies for known vulnerabilities and available patch versions. Produce a list of packages that need updating.

monthlyPerf.name: Monthly performance review
monthlyPerf.prompt: Analyse the slowest endpoints and database queries from the past month. Recommend three concrete optimisations with expected impact.

weeklyBundle.name: Weekly bundle size check
weeklyBundle.prompt: Compare this week's production bundle size against last week. Flag any increase above 5 % and identify the contributing packages or routes.

dailyA11y.name: Daily accessibility scan
dailyA11y.prompt: Run an automated accessibility check on the main user flows. Report any new WCAG violations introduced since yesterday.

fridayReview.name: Friday code review summary
fridayReview.prompt: Summarise all frontend PRs merged this week. Highlight patterns, recurring issues, and any architectural decisions that should be documented.

dailyApiHealth.name: Daily API health check
dailyApiHealth.prompt: Review recent API error rates, slow queries, and timeout logs. Summarise any anomalies and suggest root causes.

weeklyDeps.name: Weekly dependency audit
weeklyDeps.prompt: Check all project dependencies for known vulnerabilities and available patch versions. Produce a list of packages that need updating.

monthlyPerf.name: Monthly performance review
monthlyPerf.prompt: Analyse the slowest functions and queries from the past month. Recommend three concrete optimisations with expected impact.

weeklyCrash.name: Weekly crash report
weeklyCrash.prompt: Review crash analytics from the past week. Group crashes by type, affected versions, and device models. Prioritise by user impact.

dailyBuild.name: Daily build status
dailyBuild.prompt: Check the status of last night's CI builds for iOS and Android. Report any failures with the failing test or build step.

sprintRetro.name: Sprint retrospective notes
sprintRetro.prompt: Summarise what went well, what slowed the team down, and three action items for next sprint based on this week's commits and issues.

dailyCoverage.name: Daily test coverage report
dailyCoverage.prompt: Check the current test coverage percentage and compare to yesterday. Flag any files with coverage below 60 % that were modified recently.

weeklyRegression.name: Weekly regression summary
weeklyRegression.prompt: Run the regression suite and summarise the results. List any new failures, flaky tests, and tests that were fixed since last week.

preRelease.name: Pre-release checklist
preRelease.prompt: Run through the pre-release QA checklist: smoke tests, accessibility, performance budget, and open high-severity bugs. Produce a go/no-go recommendation.

dailyInfra.name: Daily infrastructure health
dailyInfra.prompt: Check CPU, memory, and disk usage across all production services. Flag anything above 80 % threshold and suggest scaling actions.

weeklyCost.name: Weekly cost report
weeklyCost.prompt: Summarise cloud spend for the past week broken down by service. Compare to the previous week and flag any unexpected spikes.

monthlySecurity.name: Monthly security audit
monthlySecurity.prompt: Scan infrastructure configs, IAM policies, and dependency trees for security misconfigurations. Produce a prioritised list of remediation items.

morningBriefing.name: Morning briefing
morningBriefing.prompt: Summarise today's calendar, pending tasks, and any important emails or notifications that need a response.

weeklyAgenda.name: Weekly agenda prep
weeklyAgenda.prompt: Review the upcoming week's meetings and tasks. Draft a prioritised agenda and flag any conflicts or missing prep materials.

monthlySummary.name: Monthly summary
monthlySummary.prompt: Produce a monthly summary covering completed tasks, key decisions made, and items carried over to next month.

dailyStandup.name: Daily standup
dailyStandup.prompt: Summarise recent activity, current blockers, and today's priorities.

weeklyReview.name: Weekly review
weeklyReview.prompt: Review the week's progress, identify what went well, and plan next week's priorities.

monthlyReport.name: Monthly report
monthlyReport.prompt: Generate a monthly progress report covering completed work, metrics, and next month's goals.
